generated_pair.question: What is the default storage class for objects in Amazon S3 if no storage class is specified during upload?
generated_pair.answer: The default storage class is S3 Standard (STANDARD).
supporting_sentences: S3 Standard (STANDARD) – The default storage class. If you don't specify the storage class when you upload an object, Amazon S3 assigns the S3 Standard storage class.

edited_pair.question: What is the default storage class for objects in Amazon S3 if no storage class is specified during upload?
edited_pair.answer: The default storage class is S3 Standard (STANDARD).

generated_pair.question: Which Amazon S3 storage class is designed to deliver the lowest latency and is described as the lowest latency cloud object storage class available today?
generated_pair.answer: S3 Express One Zone (EXPRESS_ONEZONE) is the storage class designed to deliver the lowest latency.
supporting_sentences: S3 Express One Zone (EXPRESS_ONEZONE) – Amazon S3 Express One Zone is a high-performance, single-zone Amazon S3 storage class that is purpose-built to deliver consistent, single-digit millisecond data access for your most latency-sensitive applications.
S3 Express One Zone is the lowest latency cloud object storage class available today, with data access speed up to 10x faster and with request costs 50 percent lower than S3 Standard.

generated_pair.question: What is the minimum storage duration for objects stored in the S3 Standard-IA and S3 One Zone-IA storage classes?
generated_pair.answer: The minimum storage duration for objects in S3 Standard-IA and S3 One Zone-IA is 30 days.
supporting_sentences: The S3 Standard-IA and S3 One Zone-IA storage classes are suitable for objects larger than 128 KB that you plan to store for at least 30 days.
If you delete an object before the end of the 30-day minimum storage duration period, you are charged for 30 days.

generated_pair.question: Which S3 Intelligent-Tiering access tier automatically stores objects that have not been accessed for 90 consecutive days?
generated_pair.answer: The Archive Instant Access tier automatically stores objects that have not been accessed for 90 consecutive days.
supporting_sentences: Archive Instant Access – With S3 Intelligent-Tiering, any existing objects that have not been accessed for 90 consecutive days are automatically moved to the Archive Instant Access tier.

generated_pair.question: What error occurs if you try to use the S3 Outposts (OUTPOSTS) storage class with an S3 bucket in an AWS Region?
supporting_sentences: If you try to use this storage class with an S3 bucket in an AWS Region, an InvalidStorageClass error occurs.
